Pull Request Template

- Summary: Briefly describe the changes this PR makes.
- What changed: List the modules/files touched.
- Why now: Reason for this change and alignment with ISO 27001 goals.
- ISO 27001 references: Mention any controls that are addressed (e.g., A.8.24, A.9.x, A.6.x).
- Testing & Validation: What commands were run and results (tests, docs-check, etc).
- CI/CD impact: Any changes to pipelines, secrets, or artifacts.
- Security considerations: Any potential risks introduced and mitigations.
- Release notes: If this changes version or patch, indicate version bump.
- Related issues/PRs: Link to existing PRs or issues.
- Checklist:
  - [ ] Code changes reviewed
  - [ ] Tests updated or added
  - [ ] Documentation updated
  - [ ] CI docs-check passes
  - [ ] Security review completed
